title: Canonical pnpm + Node 24 bump (supersedes PR #320)
description: Full enterprise canonical Option 2 pattern: pnpm/action-setup@v6 inserted before actions/setup-node@v5 with cache parameter, across 9 EB CI workflows. Plus Node 20->24 version pins, setup-node@v4->@v5, and engines.node bump in 3 package.json files. Supersedes failed PR #320 (scope bleed + incomplete v5 upgrade). Closes FU-NODE20-DEPRECATION-1 (P3, past 2026-06-02 GitHub-forced deadline).

outputs.description: All 9 affected CI workflows transformed to canonical Option 2 pattern. pnpm-using workflows get pnpm/action-setup@v6 inserted before setup-node@v5 with cache pnpm; npm-only workflows get cache npm to override v5 packageManager auto-detection; redundant Enable Corepack and Install pnpm steps removed; production-validation.yml gets pnpm/action-setup v4 to v6 sync for consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: No setup-node@v4 reference remains in any of the 9 scoped workflow files
No node-version with value 20 or 20.x array remains in any of the 9 scoped workflow files
Every setup-node@v5 step has either cache pnpm (with pnpm/action-setup@v6 step preceding it) or cache npm (for npm-only workflows publish-crm-package.yml and roadmap-v3-validation.yml)
production-validation.yml pnpm/action-setup version bumped from v4 to v6

outputs.description: engines.node version constraint bumped from >=20.0.0 to >=24.0.0 in 3 package.json files (root and two workspace apps).
PR #320 closed without merge with audit comment naming the supersession reason. Branch chore/node-24-workflow-bump-2026-06-09 deleted from local and remote.
acceptanceCriteria: Branch chore/node-24-workflow-bump-2026-06-09 is absent from git ls-remote origin output
PR #320 audit comment names the two failures (scope bleed plus incomplete v5 upgrade) and references this deliverable spec id

outputs.description: Replacement PR opens on fresh branch chore/node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical-2026-06-09 with explicit 12-file scope (no .dlp/ scope bleed).
acceptanceCriteria: New PR opens against main from branch chore/node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical-2026-06-09
Single commit on the new branch touches exactly the 12 files declared in scopeFiles (no .dlp/ or other unexpected paths)
All 3 required ruleset checks pass on PR CI (NV-03, vestigial .js, patterns.yml)

preMerge: Tarball applier sandbox-validated chat-side against 3 template patterns (corepack-pnpm, npm-only with registry-url plus scope, already-canonical pnpm/action-setup)
Idempotent re-apply produces 0 changes on already-transformed fixtures
SHA-drift refusal triggers exit code 1 on mismatched HEAD
Post-write verify confirms no setup-node@v4, no node-version 20, no 20.x array, no orphan corepack-pnpm steps in scoped files
All 3 required ruleset checks pass on PR CI
commit_and_merge.sh PHASE 3 stages explicit 12-file list and aborts if any unexpected file would be staged
postMerge: Main HEAD advances to squash-merge commit SHA
FU-NODE20-DEPRECATION-1 register status flipped to closed in next hygiene cycle
Three carry-forward FUs filed in next hygiene cycle (FU-EB-DLP-SPECMD-TRACKING-DOCTRINE-1, FU-EB-CI-INFRASTRUCTURE-ROT-1, FU-EB-WORKFLOW-CACHE-CLEANUP-RESIDUE-1)
EB-chat posts merge notice to #luhtech-agents-comms with full 40-char SHA per memory #27

transitions.trigger: EB-chat authored spec post L4 named-step on Option 2 canonical pattern in #luhtech-agents-process-errors

SPIKE terminal DELETE-AND-NEW-DELIVERABLE — 12-file scope insufficient for full Node 24 migration. Successor: d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-full-migration (24-file scope across 5 axes). EB execution against this spec abandoned; held tarball bb9f54c5d774163fb1236a7f2428e8e0cebf48e375305d757c9a0a50e6fe506a not applied.

notes: Supersedes PR #320 which failed via two stacked issues: (1) scope bleed (5 .dlp/d-2026-06-06-*/SPEC.md files via git add -A in commit_and_merge.sh PHASE 3, memory #6 + #13 violation); (2) incomplete setup-node@v5 upgrade (v5 default package-manager-cache true triggered pnpm-not-found before downstream corepack enable could fire, v4 to v5 breaking change for monorepos with packageManager field). Cycle 7 lesson re-applied: discipline-availability != discipline-invocation. Substrate-before-write fired this time (3 template workflow files read verbatim before authoring transformation logic) after two prior turn confident-then-retract failures in this same arc. Initial framing of this deliverable as single-repo housekeeping per cross-repo-execution-shape skill line 71 boundary was substrate-honest correction-after-the-fact: Option 2 canonical pnpm IS an architectural pattern change (replaces corepack scaffolding across 9 workflows), warranting SR audit-trail per past chat dfd26675 precedent (PR #311 deploy-dev-via-pr-label workflow change had SR deliverable spec). This spec restores that audit-trail.
